metadata.description: Autosound Tuning Skill — a portable method for tuning a car-audio DSP with REW.

plugins.name: autosound-tuning
plugins.description: Tune a car-audio DSP with REW — intake → crossovers → time alignment → phase → EQ → imaging → taste voicing, via a Generator-Critic-Arbiter review loop. Any car, any DSP. Bundles the review-loop method (independent multi-AI review + anti-anchoring).
